return(function(q,T,p,e,h,K,s,y,D,B,r,F,z,V,i,X,f,O,I,S,Z,L,W,E,o,A)I,D,r,o,S,B,i,X,V,L,F,y,Z,W,A,z,f,E,O=function(q,G)local T=Z(G)local p=function(p,e,h,K,s,F,D,W,f)return S(q,{p,e;h;K;s;F,D,W,f},G,T)end return p end,{},function(q,G)local T=Z(G)local p=function(p,e,h)return S(q,{p,e,h},G,T)end return p end,function(q,G)local T=Z(G)local p=function(p,e,h,K,s)return
